title: Add tests for truth closure items — Lane 10
boundary: Tests only — minimal source changes to enable testing
consumer_purpose: Prevent regression on 10 critical areas identified in user review by adding test coverage
claim_atoms: 1. isTerminal export and checkpointed fix + tests; 2. secretary.test.ts with isTerminal + toSMEvent + toStoreEvent tests; 3. state-machine.test.ts with reduceCampaignState predicate evaluation tests; 4. event-naming.test.ts with EventName consistency tests; 5. context/packet.test.ts with Freshness structural tests; 6. Plugin IPC test verification; 7. completeToolCall integration test notes
content:
## Phase 1 — Source changes (minimal, to enable testing)

1. **Export testable helpers from secretary.ts**
   - Export `isTerminal` function (currently private)
   - Export `toSMEvent` function (currently private)  
   - Export `toStoreEvent` function (currently private)
   - Add `"checkpointed"` to isTerminal's state check

2. **Export evaluatePredicate from state-machine.ts** (currently private)

## Phase 2 — New test files

### File 1: packages/opencode/test/campaign/secretary.test.ts
- describe("isTerminal"):
  - returns true for "failed"
  - returns true for "blocked"  
  - returns true for "returned"
  - returns true for "checkpointed"
  - returns false for non-terminal states ("created", "scouting", "scoped", etc.)
- describe("toSMEvent"):
  - maps each _tag to correct state-machine event type
  - LaneCreated → lane.created
  - StartLearning → context.sufficient
  - etc.
- describe("toStoreEvent"):
  - output eventType matches _tag
  - output has correct campaignId/laneId

### File 2: packages/opencode/test/campaign/state-machine.test.ts
- describe("reduceCampaignState"):
  - returns previous when no events
  - transitions on matching predicate
  - does not transition on non-matching predicate
- describe("evaluatePredicate"):
  - event_exists matches event type
  - retry_budget_remaining checks budget
  - repair_budget_exhausted checks repair budget
  - context_sufficient matches event
  - edit_applied matches event

### File 3: packages/opencode/test/event/event-naming.test.ts
- describe("EventName values"):
  - all values use dot-notation (contain ".")
  - all values use lowercase after prefix
  - no PascalCase in values
  - session.* events are namespaced
  - campaign.* events follow campaign. prefix

### File 4: packages/opencode/test/context/packet.test.ts
- describe("Freshness"):
  - has eventLagMs property
  - has fetchedAt property
- describe("externalChangesDetected"):
  - true when dirtyFiles.length > 0
  - false when no dirty files

### File 5: Processor test note in session/processor.test.ts or existing test
- Document that completeToolCall integration tests require full SessionProcessor pipeline
- Add Handle interface type-check test

## Phase 3 — Plugin IPC verification
- Verify existing tests at `packages/desktop/src/main/__tests__/plugin-transport-channels.test.ts` cover all three channels
- Document as complete

## Phase 4 — Run typecheck
- cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck
